user_query: My sister and nephew are joining me on Day 6. What activities would be fun for a kid?

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

node_data.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node_data.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Explicitly mentions being perfect for families and kids, featuring outdoor activities like bike riding and beaches.

node_data.name: Ripley's Aquarium
node_data.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Described as an indoor family attraction perfect for kids with interactive exhibits and marine life.

node_data.name: Sunset Grill
node_data.description: Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.

selected_nodes.reasoning: A family-friendly restaurant with a kid-friendly menu, suitable for the group joining on Day 6.
